title: Candle LLM Model Spec
description: Candle language model specification for text generation (Mistral/Llama safetensors).
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies a safetensors-format language model for text generation via the Candle backend. Candle is a lightweight Rust-based ML framework that runs models in safetensors format directly on CPU, Metal, or CUDA.

## When to use
Use this spec type when targeting the Candle runtime specifically. The default points to Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3 in safetensors format. For Apple Silicon deployments prefer the MLX backend; for quantized CPU inference prefer the GGUF backend.

## Notes
Candle LLM models are loaded from HuggingFace repositories containing `model.safetensors` or sharded safetensors files. The backend also requires `config.json` and `tokenizer.json` to be present in the repository.
